# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

apiVersion: kong.konghq.com/v1
kind: KongCluster
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
spec:
  administrative_datacenter: DC1
  KongNodes:
    - hostname: node1
      id: node1
      role: controller
      k8s:
        serviceAccountName: kong-controller
    - hostname: node2
      id: node2
      role: worker
      replicas: 3
      k8s:
        serviceAccountName: kong-worker
  plugins:
    - name: key-auth
      config:
        upstream_down_timeout: 5000
        auth_realm: 'Custom Realm'
        username_header: X-Api-Key
        apikey_source: header
    - name: kong-dns
      config: {}
  services:
    - name: service1
      url: http://service1.example.com
      host: service1.gateway.local
      connect_timeout: 5000
      plugin_ids: [key-auth]
    - name: service2
      url: http://service2.example.com
      host: service2.gateway.local
      connect_timeout: 5000
      plugin_ids: [key-auth]
  routes:
    - name: route1
      hosts: ["api.example.com"]
      paths: ["/service1/*"]
      service: service1
      strippath: 1
     tls_termination: "off"
      plugins:
        - name: kong-dns
    - name: route2
      hosts: ["api.example.com"]
      paths: ["/service2/*"]
      service: service2
      strippath: 1
      tls_termination: "off"
      plugins:
        - name: kong-dns
